labelPolicy.app repo: User-facing application, site, or standalone product/tool repository rather than an agent platform layer.
labelPolicy.plugin/add-on: Integration, extension, skill pack, config collection, or downstream OpenClaw add-on layer.
labelPolicy.agent infra: Agent platform, orchestrator, workflow engine, deployment/runtime wrapper, template, or control-plane style repo.
labelPolicy.unclear: Community/docs/config repo or mixed case that does not fit the other buckets cleanly.
